body.title: agent_datacenter: migrate workflow docs from ClaudeAndAkien, archive old repo
body.result: 4 docs migrated: framework_overview (updated for ADC), getting_started (updated for agentctl init), working_together (kept), crash_safe_sessions (kept). ClaudeAndAkien README has archived notice pointing to new repo.
body.description:
ClaudeAndAkien (~/dev/src/ClaudeAndAkien) is the spiritual ancestor of agent_datacenter — channel, claudecode helpers, docs, and skill set from March 2026. Review and migrate what's current; archive the rest.

Problem: Valuable onboarding docs exist there (framework_overview, getting_started, working_together, crash_safe_sessions) but the code and skills are superseded. Need to surface the good parts into the new repo.

Proposed shape:
- MIGRATE to agent_datacenter/docs/:
  - framework_overview.md (update dates, remove igor-specific refs)
  - getting_started.md (update to agentctl init flow)
  - working_together.md (keep as-is, workflow philosophy still valid)
  - crash_safe_sessions.md (keep, still relevant)
- DO NOT migrate: channel/channel.py (superseded by IMAP bus), claudecode/*.py (igor-specific helpers), skills/ (superseded by current TheIgors skills)
- ARCHIVE: add to ~/dev/src/ClaudeAndAkien/README.md: 'This repo is archived. Superseded by agent_datacenter (github.com/akienm/agent_datacenter). Docs migrated 2026-04-27.'

Affected files:
- ~/dev/src/ClaudeAndAkien/README.md (add archived notice)
- ~/dev/src/agent_datacenter/docs/*.md (4 migrated docs)

Design rules:
- docs-in-code: only docs that are currently accurate migrate; stale content stays archived

Scope boundary:
IN: doc migration with date+content updates, archived notice on old repo
OUT: any code migration — channel.py stays archived (will be superseded by IMAP)

Test plan:
- 4 docs exist in agent_datacenter/docs/ with updated dates
- ClaudeAndAkien README shows archived notice with pointer to new repo
